titleStmt.title: SII 40.307: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 307. (A.R. No. B. 352 of 1933.) Bondalakuṇṭa, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying in the compound of the Śiva temple.
This is dated 1466, Krōdhi, Māgha, śu. 7, corresponding to 1545 A.D., January 19, Monday.

Records the gift of land at Bondalakuṇṭa to the god Chennakēśvara, for conducting services by Siṅgarayyadēva-Mahārāja, son of Timmayadēva-Mahārāja and grandson of Chiṭṭi Anantarājadēva-Mahārāja of Ātrēya-gōtra and the Sōma-Vaṁśa, while Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Timmayadēva-Mahārāja was governing the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīnṛ śiṁhāyanamaḥ
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1466 Agunēṭi krōdhi saṁvva
tsara māgha śu 7 puṇyakālamaṁ
ddu śrīmadrājādhirājarājapara
mēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīrasadā
śivadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru
vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanā
rūḍhulai pṛthvisāmrājyamu cēyu
cuṁḍi śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁ
dyāla timmayyadēva mahārājulu
ṁgāriki pāliṁccina ghaṁḍikōṭa śīma
yēlucuṁḍu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara Ātrēyagōtraṁ sōmavaṁśō
dbhavulaina ciṭṭi Anaṁtarājudēvama
hārājapautṛlaina timmayyadēvama
hārājaputṛlaina siṁggārayyadēvamahā
rājuluṁgāru māku Amarānaku pā
liṁccina baṁddalakuṁṭa grāmamaṁddu
śrī cennakēśvaruniki dūpadhīpanaivēdyamu
vūri tūrpudaṁḍu teruvuku
ṇaṁ regaḍa cēni staḷaṁ cēnu 4 .
Akṣarālānu nalutūmu Irusa cēnu
ĀcaṁdrārkasthāIgānu dhāravosi yi
ccēnu Iṁdku yavvaru tappinanu gaṁgaka
ratānu gōbrāhmani vadhiIṁccina pā
pānaṁ bōvuvāru tamatama .
Digital edition of SII 40.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
